sections.paragraph:
μαϑητής, οῦ, ὁ [μανθάνω] ‘one who learns through instruction under a teacher’

—a. pupil Mt 10:24f; Lk 6:40.

—b. w. focus on committed attachment to a teacher adherent, disciple, ranging from many to a select few Mt 5:1 al. In Ac always in ref. to professed adherents of Jesus Christ: Ac 6:1f, 7; 9:1; 11:26; 14:22, 28; 18:23; 21:16.
